title: Frederik X of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Frederik X is King of Denmark, reigning since the abdication of his mother, Margrethe II, in January 2024.

title: Cnut the Great becomes king of Denmark
fact: Cnut, also known as Canute and with the epithet the Great, was King of England from 1016, King of Denmark from 1018, and King of Norway from 1028 until his death in 1035.

title: Margrethe II of Denmark becomes queen of Denmark
fact: Margrethe II is a member of the Danish royal family who reigned as Queen of Denmark from 14 January 1972 until her abdication on 14 January 2024.

title: Harald Bluetooth becomes king of Denmark
fact: Harald "Bluetooth" Gormsson was a king of Denmark and Norway.

title: Harthacanute becomes king of Denmark
fact: Harthacnut was King of Denmark from 1035, and King of England from 1040 until his death in 1042.

title: Sweyn I of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Swein Forkbeard was King of Denmark from 986, King of England for five weeks from December 1013, and King of Norway from 999/1000, all until his death in 1014.

title: Frederik IX of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Frederik IX was King of Denmark from 1947 to 1972.

title: Margaret I of Denmark becomes queen of Denmark
fact: Margaret I was queen regnant of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden from the late 1380s until her death, and the founder of the Kalmar Union that joined the Scandinavian kingdoms together for over a century.

title: Frederik VIII of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Frederik VIII was King of Denmark from 29 January 1906 until his death in 1912.

title: Christian X of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Christian X was King of Denmark from 1912 until his death in 1947, and the only King of Iceland as Kristján X, holding the title as a result of the personal union between Denmark and independent Iceland between 1918 and 1944.

title: Christian IX of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Christian IX was King of Denmark from 15 November 1863 until his death in 1906.

title: Christian VII of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Christian VII was King of Denmark and Norway and Duke of Schleswig and Holstein from 1766 until his death in 1808.

title: Frederick VI of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Frederick VI was King of Denmark from 13 March 1808 until his death in 1839 and King of Norway from 13 March 1808 to 7 February 1814.

title: Magnus the Good becomes king of Denmark
fact: Magnus Olafsson, better known as Magnus the Good, was King of Norway from 1035 and King of Denmark from 1042 until his death in 1047.

title: Christian II of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Christian II, a monarch under the Kalmar Union, reigned as King of Denmark and Norway from 1513 until 1523.

title: Christian IV of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Christian IV was King of Denmark and Norway and Duke of Holstein and Schleswig from 1588 until his death in 1648.

title: Christian I of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Christian I (Christiern I) was a German noble and Scandinavian monarch under the Kalmar Union.

title: Frederick VII of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Frederick VII was King of Denmark from 1848 to 1863.

title: Christian III of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Christian III reigned as King of Denmark from 1534 and King of Norway from 1537 until his death in 1559.

title: Frederick I of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Frederick I was King of Denmark and Norway from 1523 and 1524, respectively, until his death in 1533, and earlier co-duke Duke of Schleswig and Holstein.

title: Gorm the Old becomes king of Denmark
fact: Gorm the Old, also called Gorm the Languid, was ruler of Denmark, reigning from c. 936 to his death c. 958 or a few years later.

title: Frederick V of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Frederick V was King of Denmark and Norway and Duke of Schleswig-Holstein from 6 August 1746 until his death in 1766.

title: Frederick II of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Frederick II was King of Denmark and Norway and Duke of Schleswig and Holstein from 1559 until his death in 1588.

title: Frederick III of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Frederick III was King of Denmark and Norway from 1648 until his death in 1670.

title: Frederik IV of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Frederick IV was King of Denmark and Norway from 1699 until his death.

title: Sweyn II of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Sweyn II, also known as Sweyn Estridsson and Sweyn Ulfsson, was King of Denmark from 1047 until his death in 1076.

title: Eric the Victorious becomes king of Denmark
fact: Eric the Victorious was a Swedish monarch as of around 970.

title: Olaf II of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Olaf II of Denmark was King of Denmark as Olaf II from 1376 and King of Norway as Olav IV from 1380 until his death.

title: Christian V of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Christian V was King of Denmark and Norway from 1670 until his death in 1699.

title: Christopher of Bavaria becomes king of Denmark
fact: Christopher of Bavaria was King of Denmark, Sweden (1441–48) and Norway (1442–48) during the era of the Kalmar Union.

title: Canute IV of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Canute IV, later known as Canute the Holy or Saint Canute, was King of Denmark from 1080 until 1086.

title: Christian VIII of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Christian VIII was King of Denmark from 1839 to 1848 and, as Christian Frederick, King of Norway in 1814.

title: Valdemar I of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Valdemar I Knudsen, also known as Valdemar the Great, was King of Denmark from 1154 until his death in 1182.

title: Valdemar IV of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Valdemar IV Atterdag (the Restorer), Valdemar Christoffersen or Waldemar (c.

title: Harthacnut I of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Harthacnut I or Cnut I was a semi-legendary King of Denmark.

title: Valdemar II of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Valdemar II Valdemarsen, later remembered as Valdemar the Victorious and Valdemar the Conqueror, was King of Denmark from 1202 until his death in 1241.

title: Christian VI of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Christian VI was King of Denmark and Norway from 1730 to 1746.

title: John, King of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Hans, or sometimes called John was a Scandinavian monarch who ruled under the Kalmar Union.

title: Christopher II of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Christopher II was King of Denmark from 1320 to 1326 and again from 1329 until his death.

title: Gudfred becomes king of Denmark
fact: Gudfred was a ninth century Danish king who reigned from at least 804 to 810.

title: Eric I of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Eric I, also known as Eric the Good or Eric Evergood, was King of Denmark following his brother Olaf I Hunger in 1095.

title: Eric IV of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Eric IV, also known as Eric Ploughpenny or Eric Plowpenny, was King of Denmark from 1241 until his death in 1250.

title: Sigfred becomes king of Denmark
fact: Sigfred was an eighth century Danish king who is known to have reigned from before 777 to after 798.

title: Harald Klak becomes king of Denmark
fact: Harald 'Klak' Halfdansson was a king in Jutland around 812–814 and again from 819 to 827.

title: Eric V of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Eric V Klipping was King of Denmark from 1259 to 1286.

title: Olaf I of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Olaf I, nicknamed Olaf Hunger, was king of Denmark from 1086 to 1095, following the death of his brother Canute IV the Holy.

title: Canute VI of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Canute VI was King of Denmark from 1182 to 1202.

title: Eric II of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Eric II the Memorable was king of Denmark between 1134 and 1137.

title: Christopher I of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Christopher I was King of Denmark between 1252 and 1259.

title: Horik II becomes king of Denmark
fact: Horik II, also known as Hårik or, in late sources, Erik Barn, was King of the Danes from the fall of Horik I in 854 to an unknown date between 864 and 873.

title: Eric III of Denmark becomes king of Denmark
fact: Eric III Lamb was King of Denmark from 1137 until 1146.
